markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss newsletter strategy and potential collaboration between GrowthX and Metronome](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a highly effective newsletter program using Beehive, with exceptional deliverability rates and engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [The proposed newsletter strategy combines curated content, original thought leadership, and strategic CTAs to drive high-quality traffic and subscriber growth](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Next steps include a meeting between Metronome's rev marketer and GrowthX team, followed by a strategy discussion with CK (Metronome CEO) to explore implementation and financial aspects](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Newsletter Offering

  - [Uses Beehive platform for superior deliverability (70%+ open rates, 10%+ click-through rates)](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Manages entire process: design, editorial, weekly monitoring, offer optimization](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Leverages GrowthX's enterprise account (saving \~$30k in subscription costs)](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Clients retain full ownership of subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Example: Augment Code newsletter saw 17k opens from 22k recipients, 1.5k clicks ($15k value at $10/click)](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### Content Strategy and Curation

  - [Combines client's original content with curated industry insights](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Aims to deliver high value weekly while maintaining scalability](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Explores unique angles (e.g., Udemy's "skills graph" concept)](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Focuses on introducing and reinforcing key product language/positioning](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

### Subscriber Growth and ROI

  - [Utilizes Beehive's newsletter network for cost-effective subscriber acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Pays only for validated subscribers (\~$2/subscriber vs. $10/click for ads)](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Low churn rate (\~1%/week) enhances long-term value](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Creates a "high growth dividend stock" effect compared to traditional ad spend](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

### Broader Marketing Impact

  - [Rapidly increases brand mentions and citations in relevant contexts](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Example: Augment Code saw multiple citations within 24 hours of content publish](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Helps shape industry language around product positioning](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Enables programmatic action on user signals for more targeted outreach](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George and Megan to meet with Maddie (Metronome's rev marketer) to discuss specifics and answer questions](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with CK (Metronome CEO) the week of August 11th to discuss relationship structure and financials](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Marcel to send details about AI founder dinner on August 25th for potential Metronome CEO attendance](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Explore potential meetup in San Francisco during the week of August 25th](https://fathom.video/share/y27HZypTxbwNMxgobpXL3dBuCwy5dUso?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
